title: T-016 — UI: RPT-001 Factory Overview (/reporting/factory-overview) — KPI tiles + combo chart + OEE tile + top 3 + all-lines table (12-REPORTING §15.1, §4.1 #1)
prompt:
# T-016 — RPT-001 Factory Overview UI

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1 RPT-001, §4.1 #1 (highest-traffic dashboard), §8.1 Factory Overview flow, §13.1 layout standards, §6 D-RPT-9 (OEE consumer tile)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/catalog-screens.jsx:251-398 (`rpt_factory_overview`)
UX: prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:223-263

## Goal
Server Component page `/reporting/factory-overview` rendering: KPI row (yield_pct, giveaway_pct, efficiency_pct, total_cases, total_variance_gbp), 13-week combo chart (line + bar), Top 3 Gains / Top 3 Losses mini-panels, All-Lines summary table with drill-to-yield-by-line, OEE Summary tile (consumer of 15-OEE via T-011), Freshness strip, Filter chips, Week selector, Export dropdown. KPIs and formulas from KPI glossary (T-002). Highest-traffic dashboard — Suspense-bound per-tile data fetching + Redis cache 60s.

## Prototype parity
- Source: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/catalog-screens.jsx:251-398` (`rpt_factory_overview`)
- UX: `prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:223-263`
- Translation: RPT_FO_KPIS / RPT_FO_TREND mock → Drizzle queries against mv_factory_kpi_week + mv_yield_by_line_week (service helpers T-003); ChartCombo inline SVG → Recharts ComposedChart per BL-RPT-02; OEE tile → T-011 oee-consumer getOeeDailySummary (graceful degradation banner if 15-OEE absent); FreshnessStrip → mv_refresh_log reader; FilterChips + WeekSelector → nuqs URL state; ExportDropdown → triggers Server Action from T-013; all labels → next-intl `reporting.factory_overview.*`.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/factory-overview/page.tsx` (RSC) — parallel-fetch KPI / trend / lines / OEE; Suspense per tile.
2. Cell components in `apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/cells/` — YieldCell, GradeBadge, VarianceBadge, SparkLine (reused by T-017+).
3. Chart wrapper `apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/charts/combo-chart.tsx` — Recharts ComposedChart with @media print stylesheet.
4. OEE tile component `apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/oee-tile.tsx` — renders consumer 15-OEE badge + placeholder when MV absent (T-011 pattern).
5. Top 3 Gains/Losses computed server-side via `ORDER BY var_gbp DESC LIMIT 3` / `ASC LIMIT 3` (not client array slice — translation-notes red line).
6. Empty / loading / error / permission states; RTL + Playwright parity test.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/factory-overview/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/factory-overview/_components/factory-overview-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/cells/yield-cell.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/cells/grade-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/cells/variance-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/cells/spark-line.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/charts/combo-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/oee-tile.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/factory-overview/__tests__/factory-overview.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-factory-overview.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/catalog-screens.jsx:251-398`, then it has the same 5 KPI tiles + 13-week combo chart + Top 3 Gains + Top 3 Losses + All-Lines table + OEE tile + Freshness strip — verified by RTL snapshot + Playwright parity.
2. Given mv_factory_kpi_week has seeded rows for org_A, when the page renders under org_A session, then KPI tiles show weighted_yield_pct, weighted_ga_pct, etc. exactly as computed by T-003 (server-side, not recomputed client-side).
3. Given 15-OEE module is NOT deployed, when the OEE tile renders, then it shows the 'OEE data unavailable' placeholder (T-011 graceful degradation path).
4. Given Top 3 Gains/Losses are rendered, when the SQL is inspected via integration test, then it uses ORDER BY var_gbp DESC LIMIT 3 / ASC LIMIT 3 (server-side, not client slice).
5. Given URL searchParams `?week=2026-W18`, when the page renders, then the WeekSelector reflects that week and all queries filter by week_ending = corresponding Saturday.
6. Given user without `rpt.dashboard.view`, when accessing /reporting/factory-overview, then middleware (T-009) returns 403 + audit row.
7. Given UI parity policy, when closeout is reviewed, then Playwright trace + screenshot artifact paths attached; empty / loading / error / permission states tested.
8. Hardcoded labels are absent — all visible strings via next-intl `reporting.factory_overview.*`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL test asserting parity + 5 KPI tiles + chart + tables + OEE-absent path + Top 3 server-side; Playwright visual parity vs prototype.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test factory-overview && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-factory-overview`.
- GREEN: build RSC + cells + charts + OEE tile.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import D3 directly into Server Components — Recharts wrapper only (BL-RPT-02).
- Do not slice Top 3 client-side — server-side ORDER BY LIMIT 3 only.
- Do not skip @media print CSS on combo chart (BL-RPT-04 for export).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not put long-running queries on the request path — read from MVs only (D-RPT-1).
- Do not bypass T-011's OEE consumer graceful-degradation pattern; never query oee_daily_summary directly from this page.
- Do not duplicate KPI formulas in client; consume KPI glossary (T-002) for labels/units.
